intro: The clearest split is that CleverTap scores notably higher on transparency than Braze. Braze is Customer engagement platform with push, in-app messages, email, SMS, WhatsApp, and Canvas journey orchestration; CleverTap is Mobile engagement and retention platform with push, in-app, SMS, email, and built-in analytics and. The data points Braze at mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging, and CleverTap at mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging. Pricing: Braze is subscription from $10; CleverTap is subscription from $75. Lock-in is high for Braze and high for CleverTap, with DX at 5/5 vs 4/5 and transparency at 1/5 vs 3/5. On listed strengths, Braze emphasises mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging, and CleverTap emphasises mobile app engagement and user lifecycle messaging. Both offer an enterprise tier for larger rollouts. Honest trade-off: neither fits web-only products without mobile, so if that is your context, look elsewhere; otherwise pick on the pivotal factor above and the DX score that matters most to your team.
quick_take: Braze is for mobile; CleverTap is for mobile; decide based on how much transparency you need.
verdict_a: Choose Braze if opaque pricing is not a blocker for your procurement and your workload matches mobile. Skip it if your context is web-only products without mobile.
verdict_b: Choose CleverTap if moderate transparency is acceptable and your workload matches mobile. Skip it if your context is web-only products without mobile.

faq.a: Listed entry pricing is $10 for Braze and $75 for CleverTap. Neither lists a free tier. Total cost at scale depends on usage and plan details that are not in this dataset, so confirm with each vendor.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Braze to CleverTap?
faq.a: Braze is tagged with high lock-in (engagement platform, deep user data). CleverTap is tagged with high lock-in (proprietary engagement platform). At least one side is high lock-in, so budget migration time for re-implementing integrations.

faq.q: Which has better developer experience, Braze or CleverTap?
faq.a: The dataset rates Braze at 5/5 for developer experience and CleverTap at 4/5, so Braze scores higher. That score reflects overall polish rather than any single integration, so trial both against your stack before committing.

faq.q: Is CleverTap a good alternative to Braze?
faq.a: Yes for teams whose workload matches mobile, since both list the same fit. CleverTap is flagged as not for web-only products without mobile, so confirm your context does not fall there.
